company_summary: Oracle is a global enterprise technology company specialising in cloud infrastructure (OCI), databases, and enterprise applications (ERP, HCM, SCM). It is aggressively expanding its cloud market share competing with AWS and Azure, with recent hyperscaler infrastructure wins and growing AI/LLM integration across its Fusion and NetSuite product lines. Oracle's product direction is heavily focused on autonomous database, cloud-native services, and embedding AI into enterprise workflows.
fit_indicators: Oracle runs one of the largest Java ecosystems in enterprise software — Sudheer has 4 years of Java/Spring Boot production experience at RNTBCI, giving him credibility in engineering conversations that most MBA PMs lack

Oracle PM interns are expected to bridge engineering and business stakeholders — Sudheer managed cross-functional internal tooling at RNTBCI used daily across Nissan, Renault, and Mitsubishi operations, demonstrating exactly this bridging function

Oracle is actively embedding AI into its Fusion and cloud product lines — Sudheer is currently building multi-agent AI systems with the Claude API, directly relevant to Oracle's AI product integration push
Oracle's enterprise focus on legacy modernisation and cloud migration maps to Sudheer's RNTBCI work modernising legacy systems into microservices architecture for a global automotive OEM
Oracle PM roles require authentication, security, and identity product familiarity — Sudheer implemented OKTA-based auth systems at RNTBCI in enterprise production environments

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager, Oracle Cloud or Fusion Applications
contact_targets.reason: Most likely manager or peer for the PM intern — can speak directly to what the role demands and champion a strong candidate internally

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager or Principal Engineer, OCI or Database Products
contact_targets.reason: PM interns at Oracle work closely with engineering — a technical contact who sees Sudheer's Java and microservices background will appreciate the rare PM-with-real-engineering-depth angle

contact_targets.title: MBA Recruiting Lead or University Programs Manager
contact_targets.reason: Oracle runs structured MBA internship pipelines — recruiter contact is useful here as a third option to confirm programme fit and timeline
